title: Xali's Bushy Leaves - Regions Unexplored Addon
description: A Regions Unexplored Addon for Xali's Bushy Leaves
body:
This is a simple compatiblity addon for [Xali's Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-bushy-leaves) that adds bushy leaves to [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored).Included are also two different optional expansions, one that adds back ambient occlusion, which is originaly disabled in Xali's resource pack, and one that further expands the already integrated [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) & [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) compatibility.

If you have more bushy leaves compat recommendations post it on the [GitHub](https://github.com/mxKeaton/Xali-s-Leaves-Regions-Unexplored/issues) or are looking for a compat between Complementary Shaders and Regions Unexplored [DM me on Discord](https://discordapp.com/users/232897059273834497)!

Place all packs in this order!

![Sort Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eab54a676ebceb6e7589b3822f9741ce2bec7f9d.png)
